details: Verified on governance micro-pass: VISUAL_QA_REFINEMENT_COMPLETE=YES and five required PNGs present under figures/switching/diagnostics/corrected_old_task002_quality_QA_refined/.
All required refined QA PNGs were generated in corrected_old_task002_quality_QA_refined and documented.
Scope restricted to Switching artifacts only.
No new physics reconstruction or model re-fit executed.
Figures built only from approved source view plus corrected-old authoritative tables and by_T metrics.
Refined Figure 1 includes S_percent source map from run_2026_04_24_233348 source view filtered to builder window/support.
NaN/unsupported cells are shown by axis background through AlphaData masking in light gray with explicit annotations.
Unsupported cells are not color-mapped data values and are visually separated from colormap scale.
Refined Figure 2 uses shared symmetric scale from max absolute residual-before values.
Refined Figure 3 uses tighter residual-after symmetric limits with explicit support mask note.
Refined Figure 4 overlays markers at finite Phi1 support points and states connector-line caveat.
Refined Figure 4 marks 22 K and 24 K local-feature region and 30 K high-temperature boundary caution.
Refined Figure 5 includes per-T improvement factor RMSE_backbone divided by RMSE_after_mode1.
Only PNG exports were generated.
Outputs written only to diagnostic refined folder.
No mixed canonical PT/CDF diagnostics were used.
No quarantined corrected-old artifacts were used.
No old figure images used as numeric inputs.
Builder or physics logic was not modified.
Authoritative corrected-old CSV outputs were read-only.
No deletions or renames performed.
Refined diagnostics now clearly disclose support gaps and preserve residual magnitude context.
Diagnostic refinement improves review clarity but does not satisfy publication authorization gates.
